name: linkace-search
title: LinkAce Search
description: Search, filter, and open links from your LinkAce instance
author: zisoft

commands.name: search-linkace
commands.title: Search LinkAce
commands.subtitle: Search bookmarks from your LinkAce instance
commands.description: Search, filter, inspect, and open links from LinkAce

commands.name: test-linkace-connection
commands.title: Test LinkAce Connection
commands.subtitle: Verify URL, API key, and proxy settings
commands.description: Test connectivity and authentication for your LinkAce instance

preferences.name: linkaceUrl
preferences.title: LinkAce URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your LinkAce instance

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Personal API key used to access your LinkAce instance

preferences.name: proxyUrl
preferences.title: Proxy URL
preferences.description: Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL used for API requests. Overrides environment and system proxy settings.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
